title: I Still Dream of Taking First!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're training for the Japanese Derby, Rice
Shower tells Matikanetannhauser about her
admiration for Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, several reporters arrive at the
academy to interview Mihono Bourbon. Among
them is a dejected-looking reporter in round
glasses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reporters seem to think Mihono Bourbon is
the only Umamusume who has a chance of
winning. They tell Matikanetannhauser that no
one is interested in reading about anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser tells them, "I know there's
nothing special about me, but if it's not first
place, I don't need it!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks passionately, and her words seem to
have struck a chord with the gloomy reporter in
the round glasses.
